name: multi-company-portal
description: Multi-company login portal that hosts the FinTrack financial app per tenant, with master/staff accounts.
whatsNew: New "Bank Block" entry type (in the More drawer) for clearing a frozen bank's balance: it lowers that bank's total and adds the amount to a new "Bank Blocked" stat card.
"Bank Block" doesn't touch your deposit, withdrawal or store totals — it only moves the bank balance.
